nasb.text: Moses sent to spy out Jazer, and they captured its villages and dispossessed the Amorites who were there.

esv.text: And Moses sent to spy out Jazer, and they captured its villages and dispossessed the Amorites who were there.

cnv.text: 摩西派人去窺探雅謝，以色列人就佔領了雅謝的村鎮，把那裡的亞摩利人趕走。

ccb.text: 摩西派人去雅谢打探，然后出兵攻占了雅谢及其周围的村庄，赶走那里的亚摩利人。
